title: Cribl Route
description: A Cribl route that applies filter expressions on incoming data events to direct matching results to the appropriate pipeline and destination for processing and delivery.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the route

filter.description: JavaScript filter expression that determines which events match this route. Use true to match all events.

pipeline.description: The pipeline identifier to process matching events through

output.description: The destination identifier where processed events are sent

final.description: Whether matching events stop being evaluated by subsequent routes in the route table

disabled.description: Whether this route is disabled and should be skipped during evaluation

description.description: A human-readable description of the route purpose and behavior

groups.description: Worker group or fleet-specific route configuration overrides

clones.description: Additional pipeline and destination pairs that receive copies of matching events

RouteClone.description: A clone destination that receives a copy of events matching the parent route.

pipeline.description: The pipeline identifier for processing cloned events

output.description: The destination identifier for the cloned events

filter.description: Additional filter expression for this clone
